title: DriveWealth Order
description: A trade order submitted through the DriveWealth REST API representing a buy or sell instruction for a financial instrument on behalf of an investor account.

accountID.description: Account identifier against which this order is placed.

userID.description: User identifier associated with the account placing the order.

instrumentID.description: DriveWealth unique identifier for the financial instrument being traded.

symbol.description: Ticker symbol of the instrument (e.g., AAPL, SPY).

quantity.description: Number of shares to trade (null for dollar-amount orders).

amount.description: Dollar amount to trade (null for share-quantity orders). Supports fractional shares.

limitPrice.description: Limit price for LIMIT and STOP_LIMIT orders.

stopPrice.description: Stop trigger price for STOP and STOP_LIMIT orders.

filledQuantity.description: Total shares filled for this order.

avgPrice.description: Average execution price of filled shares.

fees.description: Regulatory and exchange fees assessed for this order.

externalOrderID.description: Partner-assigned order identifier for idempotency and reconciliation.

createdWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

executedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was fully executed.

updatedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last order status update.
